allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const icons = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('image'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('scan'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('badge'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('check'\)\); console.log\(icons.join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const icons = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => !k.endsWith\('Icon'\) && \(k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('image'\) || k === 'ScanSearch' || k === 'Scan' || k === 'FileImage'\)\); console.log\(icons.join\('\\n'\)\);")
